name: Tuna Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti as directed on package; drain.
2. Cook garlic in margarine in a 2-quart saucepan until garlic is golden brown.
3. Stir in half-and-half, basil and oregano. Heat to boiling.
4. Stir in tuna, olives, and cheese. Boil and stir for 1 minute.
5. Pour over hot spaghetti. Sprinkle with snipped parsley if desired.
5 servings: 375 calories per serving. From Betty Crocker's Cookbook.
